_comment: Authoritative record for the curated Grounding DINO literature collection. One object per unique paper. 'sha256' and generated artifacts (papers.csv, papers.bib, checksums.sha256, download_status.md) are produced/refreshed by scripts/generate_inventory.py. PDFs are fetched only from official sources (arXiv / CVF / official publisher) by scripts/download_papers.py, which validates the %PDF magic bytes. This file complements manifests/papers.json (the drone-project reproducibility manifest); this one is the expanded literature record.

papers.title: Grounding DINO: Marrying DINO with Grounded Pre-Training for Open-Set Object Detection
papers.authors: Shilong Liu, Zhaoyang Zeng, Tianhe Ren, Feng Li, Hao Zhang, Jie Yang, Qing Jiang, Chunyuan Li, Jianwei Yang, Hang Su, Jun Zhu, Lei Zhang
papers.notes: Primary paper for locally runnable system #1. Open-set detector marrying the DINO detector with grounded (BERT) language pre-training.

papers.title: An Open and Comprehensive Pipeline for Unified Object Grounding and Detection
papers.authors: Xiangyu Zhao, Yicheng Chen, Shilin Xu, Xiangtai Li, Xinjiang Wang, Yining Li, Haian Huang
papers.notes: Primary paper for locally runnable system #2 (MM-Grounding-DINO). A from-scratch, open-source reimplementation of Grounding DINO built inside OpenMMLab's MMDetection; adds new pre-training datasets and configs. Lives in mmdetection at configs/mm_grounding_dino/ and mmdet/models/detectors/grounding_dino.py.

papers.title: Grounded SAM: Assembling Open-World Models for Diverse Visual Tasks
papers.authors: Tianhe Ren, Shilong Liu, Ailing Zeng, Jing Lin, Kunchang Li, He Cao, Jiayu Chen, Xinyu Huang, Yukang Chen, Feng Yan, Zhaoyang Zeng, Hao Zhang, Feng Li, Jie Yang, Hongyang Li, Qing Jiang, Lei Zhang
papers.notes: Primary paper for locally runnable system #3. A PIPELINE (not a new base detector) assembling Grounding DINO (open-set detection) with Segment Anything (promptable segmentation).

papers.title: PET-DINO: Unifying Visual Cues into Grounding DINO with Prompt-Enriched Training
papers.authors: Weifu Fu, Jinyang Li, Bin-Bin Gao, Jialin Li, Yuhuan Lin, Hanqiu Deng, Wenbing Tao, Yong Liu, Chengjie Wang
papers.notes: Primary paper for locally runnable system #5. Extends Grounding DINO with prompt-enriched training that unifies textual AND visual prompts. Project page: https://fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino/ ; CVF: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2026/papers/Fu_PET-DINO_Unifying_Visual_Cues_into_Grounding_DINO_with_Prompt-Enriched_Training_CVPR_2026_paper.pdf

papers.title: End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers
papers.authors: Nicolas Carion, Francisco Massa, Gabriel Synnaeve, Nicolas Usunier, Alexander Kirillov, Sergey Zagoruyko
papers.notes: DETR: the transformer set-prediction detector that DINO (and hence Grounding DINO) descends from. Foundation reading.

papers.title: DINO: DETR with Improved DeNoising Anchor Boxes for End-to-End Object Detection
papers.authors: Hao Zhang, Feng Li, Shilong Liu, Lei Zhang, Hang Su, Jun Zhu, Lionel M. Ni, Heung-Yeung Shum
papers.notes: The DETR-based detector whose architecture Grounding DINO builds directly upon (denoising training, mixed query selection, contrastive denoising).

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
papers.authors: Jacob Devlin, Ming-Wei Chang, Kenton Lee, Kristina Toutanova
papers.notes: The text encoder family used by Grounding DINO to embed language prompts.

papers.title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows
papers.authors: Ze Liu, Yutong Lin, Yue Cao, Han Hu, Yixuan Wei, Zheng Zhang, Stephen Lin, Baining Guo
papers.notes: The hierarchical vision backbone (Swin-T/B/L) used as Grounding DINO / MM-Grounding-DINO image encoder.

papers.title: Segment Anything
papers.authors: Alexander Kirillov, Eric Mintun, Nikhila Ravi, Hanzi Mao, Chloe Rolland, Laura Gustafson, Tete Xiao, Spencer Whitehead, Alexander C. Berg, Wan-Yen Lo, Piotr Dollar, Ross Girshick
papers.notes: SAM: the promptable segmentation foundation model that Grounded SAM pairs with Grounding DINO.

papers.title: SAM 2: Segment Anything in Images and Videos
papers.authors: Nikhila Ravi, Valentin Gabeur, Yuan-Ting Hu, Ronghang Hu, Chaitanya Ryali, Tengyu Ma, Haitham Khedr, Roman Radle, Chloe Rolland, Laura Gustafson, Eric Mintun, Junting Pan, Kalyan Vasudev Alwala, Nicolas Carion, Chao-Yuan Wu, Ross Girshick, Piotr Dollar, Christoph Feichtenhofer
papers.notes: SAM 2: adds memory-based video segmentation/tracking. The academic foundation for the Grounded SAM 2 software integration (system #4) and the 10+ Hz tracking stage.

papers.title: Grounding DINO 1.5: Advance the "Edge" of Open-Set Object Detection
papers.authors: Tianhe Ren, Qing Jiang, Shilong Liu, Zhaoyang Zeng, Wenlong Liu, Han Gao, Hongjie Huang, Zhengyu Ma, Xiaoke Jiang, Yihao Chen, Yuda Xiong, Hao Zhang, Feng Li, Peijun Tang, Kent Yu, Lei Zhang
papers.notes: Pro and Edge variants. IMPORTANT: Grounding DINO 1.5/1.6 are served as CLOUD APIs; no public local checkpoints. Do not design the Jetson pipeline around them.

papers.title: DINO-X: A Unified Vision Model for Open-World Object Detection and Understanding
papers.authors: Tianhe Ren, Yihao Chen, Qing Jiang, Zhaoyang Zeng, Yuda Xiong, Wenlong Liu, Zhaoyang Zeng, Junyi Shen, Yuan Yao, Hongyang Li, Lei Zhang, and others
papers.notes: Unified open-world detection + understanding successor in the Grounding DINO lineage. API-only; no public local checkpoints.

papers.title: VideoGrounding-DINO: Towards Open-Vocabulary Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding
papers.authors: Syed Talal Wasim, Muzammal Naseer, Salman Khan, Ming-Hsuan Yang, Fahad Shahbaz Khan
papers.notes: Extends Grounding DINO to open-vocabulary spatio-temporal video grounding.

papers.title: Unlocking the Potential of Grounding DINO in Videos: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Limited-Data Spatio-Temporal Grounding
papers.authors: Zanyi Wang, Fan Li, Dengyang Jiang, Liuzhuozheng Li, Yunhua Zhong, Guang Dai, and others
papers.notes: Parameter-efficient adaptation of Grounding DINO for limited-data spatio-temporal video grounding.

papers.title: Segment Anything Model for automated image data annotation: empirical studies using text prompts from Grounding DINO
papers.authors: Fuseini Mumuni, Alhassan Mumuni
papers.notes: Empirical study of a Grounding-DINO -> SAM annotation pipeline; benchmarks text-prompted auto-annotation.

papers.title: Utilizing Grounded SAM for self-supervised frugal camouflaged human detection
papers.authors: Matthias Pijarowski, Alexander Wolpert, Martin Heckmann, Michael Teutsch
papers.venue: SPIE Automatic Target Recognition XXXIV, vol. 13039
papers.notes: Uses Grounded SAM for self-supervised (frugal) labeling; relevant to ATR-style pipelines.

papers.title: Colony Grounded SAM2: Zero-shot detection and segmentation of bacterial colonies using foundation models
papers.authors: Daan Korporaal, Patrick de Kruijf, Ralph H. G. M. Litjens, Bas H. M. van der Velden
papers.notes: Applies a Grounded SAM 2 style pipeline zero-shot; concrete example of the Grounded SAM 2 integration in use.

papers.title: Dynamic-DINO: Fine-Grained Mixture of Experts Tuning for Real-time Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.authors: Yehao Lu, Minghe Weng, Zekang Xiao, Rui Jiang, Wei Su, Guangcong Zheng, Ping Lu, Xi Li
papers.notes: Mixture-of-Experts tuning for REAL-TIME open-vocabulary detection; directly relevant to efficient/edge deployment of the Grounding DINO family.

papers.title: Grounding DINO-US-SAM: Text-Prompted Multi-Organ Segmentation in Ultrasound with LoRA-Tuned Vision-Language Models
papers.authors: Hamza Rasaee, Taha Koleilat, Hassan Rivaz
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Ultrasonics, Ferroelectrics, and Frequency Control
papers.notes: LoRA-tuned Grounding DINO + SAM for medical ultrasound; a parameter-efficient domain-adaptation technique.

papers.title: Few-Shot Adaptation of Grounding DINO for Agricultural Domain
papers.authors: Rajhans Singh, Rafael Bidese Puhl, Kshitiz Dhakal, Sudhir Sornapudi
papers.notes: Few-shot fine-tuning recipe for Grounding DINO in agriculture; a concrete adaptation technique.

papers.title: Pseudo-Text-Conditioned 3D Grounding DINO for Organ Localization in Abdominal CT
papers.authors: Siqi Chen, Han Gong, Keyi Hou, Jingxuan Yang, Sheethal Bhat, Andreas Maier
papers.notes: Architectural adaptation of Grounding DINO to 3D medical volumes with pseudo-text conditioning.

papers.title: RefDrone: A Challenging Benchmark for Referring Expression Comprehension in Drone Scenes
papers.authors: Zhichao Sun, Yepeng Liu, Huachao Zhu, Yuliang Gu, Yuda Zou, Zelong Liu, Gui-Song Xia, Bo Du, Yongchao Xu
papers.notes: Aerial/drone referring-expression benchmark; its NGDINO baseline is a Grounding DINO derivative. Directly relevant to the drone target-finding application. Also tracked in manifests/papers.json.

papers.title: Zero-Shot and Supervised Bird Image Segmentation Using Foundation Models: A Dual-Pipeline Approach with Grounding DINO, YOLO, and SAM
papers.authors: Abhinav Munagala, and others
papers.notes: Dual-pipeline (Grounding DINO + YOLO + SAM) bird segmentation; representative applied integration.

papers.title: Low-Rank Prompt Adaptation for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.authors: Zekun Zhang, Vu Quang Truong, Minh Hoai
papers.notes: Metadata verified (IEEE ICCVW 2025, closed access). Not on arXiv/CVF; no open-access PDF exists. URL NOT fabricated; recorded as pending. Manual review / institutional access required to obtain the PDF.
